scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,WEB -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix react-volunteer-app run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n SERVER,WEB -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run start" "npm --prefix react-volunteer-app run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix react-volunteer-app install
scripts.test: npm --prefix server run test:run && npm --prefix react-volunteer-app run test:run
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix server run coverage && npm --prefix react-volunteer-app run coverage
